heading: Publication of commercial information
label: 188 Publication of commercial information
text: The Secretary of Commerce shall publish official notifications, from time to time, of such commercial information communicated to him by diplomatic and consular officers, as he may deem important to the public interests, in such newspapers, not to exceed three in number, as he may select.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 211 derived from , .act Aug. 18, 1856, ch. 127, § 211 Stat. 60
Change of NameAct , substituted “Secretary of Commerce” for “Secretary of Commerce and Labor”.Mar. 4, 1913
Transfer of FunctionsAct , transferred Bureau of Statistics from Treasury Department to Department of Commerce and Labor.Feb. 14, 1903
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 211 derived from , .act Aug. 18, 1856, ch. 127, § 211 Stat. 60
